{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322045811092AFCC025DD8C2387D3"}"},"total":4189},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7388408501720072985","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"首先是一本非常优秀的爽文，包括但不限于各种打脸反派、扮猪吃老虎等剧情，其次是一本优质的科普文，里面有很多关于各国经济、军事、历史与人文的科普知识，用很大众化的语言能观众在爽的同时获得阅历，总之是非常优秀的文章！希望作者能持续更新！感谢付出","text_exts":[{"e":31,"s":26,"text":"扮猪吃老虎","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%89%AE%E7%8C%AA%E5%90%83%E8%80%81%E8%99%8E&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741266918C2387D3%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227388408501720072985%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226985461994937650213%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%89%AE%E7%8C%AA%E5%90%83%E8%80%81%E8%99%8E%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1720328762,"group_id":"6985461994937650213","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyT3MhqTeYzWkiRDN02k6hQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"189531057818960","user_name":"爱吃腌凤爪的舒德妃"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"189531057818960","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6985461994937650213","book_info":{"abstract":"前世娶了扶弟魔，父母被拖累病逝，蹉跎一生，上天给了陈默一次重生的机会回到20年前。
